title: dracaena suffruticosa subsp. longituba
intro: Dracaena suffruticosa subsp. longituba, commonly known as the 'Dragon Tree', is a plant species native to the Philippines. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
